name: vpsops
description: Secure VPS setup, client delivery, relay design, monitoring, auditing, and maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Secure VPS setup, clients, relays, and monitoring.
interface.longDescription: A reusable workflow for safe access, deployments, local proxy clients, optional relay topologies, monitoring, and repeatable health audits.
defaultPrompt: Use $vpsops to securely bootstrap my new VPS.
Use $vpsops to audit this VPS without changing it.
Use $vpsops to design an optional relay and landing topology.
Use $vpsops to configure my local proxy clients and routing.
Use $vpsops to add private daily VPS reports and alerts.
